name: Emperor Energy Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 35% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.1000, stop A$0.0792, target A$0.1200 (0.96:1) — then trail it.
